title:
Lesson 1:
Reactions & What Happened
description: 'Gerçekten mi?' = Really? 'Ciddi misin?' = Are you serious? 'Ne oldu?' = What happened? 'Şaka mı yapıyorsun?' = Are you joking? Use these to react to surprising news.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Listen, they offered me the job.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Evet ama bir sorun da var.
dialogue.english: Yes but there's also a problem.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: The salary is half of what I expected.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Are you joking? That can't be!

title:
Lesson 2:
What Are You Doing / Saying
description: 'Ne yapıyorsun?' = What are you doing? 'Ne yapıyordun?' = What were you doing? 'Ne dedin?' = What did you say? These are essential for everyday conversation.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Az önce tuhaf bir şey söyledin.
dialogue.english: You said something weird just now.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: What did you say I said?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: What were you usually doing on Sundays?

title:
Lesson 3:
Which / How Are You / Since When
description: 'Hangisi?' = Which one? 'Hangisini seviyorsun?' = Which one do you like? 'Nasılsın?' = How are you? 'Nasıl geçiyor?' = How's it going? 'Ne zamandan beri?' = Since when?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I'm good, thanks. How is the year going?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Very well. I have a new car.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Since when do you have a car?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Geçen aydan beri. Hangisini seviyorsun, kırmızı mı mavi mi?
dialogue.english: Since last month. Which do you like, red or blue?
